name: Bhai Pritpal Singh Bedi (Kolkata)
body: The biography below was kindly provided by Bibi Paramjeet Kaur Ji from Kolkata.

Bhai Pritpal Singh Bedi, born on December 25, 1963, in Kolkata, is a distinguished Sikh kirtan artist who has dedicated his life to devotional music. Now 61 years old, he continues his musical service to the community with unwavering devotion, despite managing Type 1 diabetes.

Bhai Pritpal Singh’s musical journey began under the guidance of his father, Bhai Mohanpal Singh Bedi, who was visually impaired yet deeply committed to kirtan. From the tender age of 12, young Pritpal would accompany his father on the tabla while pursuing his education. His dedication to learning was largely self-directed, with Bhai Rajinder Singh ji (Singapore Walle) serving as his inspiration and role model.

Known for his melodious voice and distinctive style, Bhai Pritpal Singh has earned widespread recognition throughout Kolkata and neighboring cities. His musical prowess reflects years of dedicated practice and spiritual devotion, creating a unique sound that resonates with audiences across different communities.

Bhai Pritpal Singh’s professional kirtan career, commenced at Gurdwara Bara Sikh Sangat in Burra Bazaar, Kolkata. His most significant tenure was as Hazoori Ragi at Gurdwara Sant Kutiya, Kolkata, where he served devotedly for 19 years. Subsequently, he continued his service as Hazoori Ragi at Gurdwara Behala, Kolkata, for six years. Unfortunately, health challenges eventually prevented him from maintaining regular gurdwara commitments, leading him to transition to private kirtan programs upon request.

His musical service has transcended geographical boundaries, with notable performances at Bangkok Gurdwara and Phuket Gurdwara on multiple occasions. Throughout India, he has given his kirtan sewa on various Gurpurabs and special occasions across numerous cities including Bangalore, Shillong, Guwahati, Bhubaneswar, Cuttack, Corba, Ranchi, Dhanbad, Asansol, Raniganj, Dhubri Sahib, Alwar, Kharagpur, and many others.

Bhai Pritpal Singh Bedi’s life exemplifies, dedication to spiritual service, through music. Despite health challenges, his commitment to kirtan remains unwavering. The Sikh community continues to pray that Waheguruji grants him strength and health to continue his sacred musical service for years to come.
